alam_mo_ba: 'Gwapo' comes from Spanish 'guapo.' 'Maganda' is pure Tagalog. The two words exist side by side without friction — a small snapshot of how Filipino vocabulary layers its colonial history with its indigenous roots.
completion_reward.alam_mo_ba_display: Show 1 random fun fact on lesson completion screen.

progress_ring.display: Ring animates from X/5 to (X+1)/5 on session completion
